```{=html}
<section class="hero">
  <div class="hero__header">
    <h1 class="hero__title">Open Science in the Swedish Context</h1>
    <img
      class="hero__logo"
      src="img/SciLifeLab_Logotype_NEG.png"
      alt="SciLifeLab logo"
    />
  </div>
  <p class="hero__subtitle">
    Implement Open Science practices into every step of your research project.
  </p>
  <div class="hero__actions">
{{< include _generated/hero-actions.qmd >}}
  </div>
</section>
```
